params.name: Eight Proposals
params.description:
On Jun 9, 1867 AD, Sakamoto Ryoma discussed the Eight Proposals with Goto Shojiro on board a Tosa ship.
The Eight Proposals were eight political reform plans proposed by Sakamoto Ryoma and Goto Shojiro during a meeting on a Tosa ship outside Nagasaki. Sakamoto Ryoma outlined the need for a democratically elected bicameral legislature, the writing of a constitution, the formation of a national army and navy, and the regulation of the exchange rates of gold and silver.
